name: Vanguarr
overview: Surfaces per-user Suggested for You channels from Vanguarr inside Jellyfin.
description: Connects Jellyfin to Vanguarr's Suggested for You API, resolves ranked suggestions to existing library items, and exposes them as a per-user channel without extra libraries or symlink trees.

versions.changelog:
- Replaces the playlist sync with per-user Suggested for You Jellyfin channels.
- Suggested shows can now be browsed into seasons and episodes from the plugin surface.
- Updates the config page and docs to match the new channel-based UX.
